headlines.title: Lettuce or salad greens could be source of diarrhea-causing illness, Michigan health officials say
headlines.description: The foodborne gastrointestinal illness has shown up in 31 states, and federal health officials say 86 people have been hospitalized.

headlines.title: Cyclosporiasis Outbreaks Hits More Than Half of the US
headlines.description: Cases of a severe stomach bug called Cyclosporiasis are surging across the United States, sickening thousands of Americans and even sending some to the hospital. NBC’s medical contributor Dr. John Torress joins TODAY to break down the symptoms and how you can stay safe.

headlines.title: New warnings from doctors over viral 'tanmaxxing' trend
headlines.description: A viral trend called "tanmaxxing" has people skipping sunscreen and tracking UV levels. But dermatologists are sounding the alarm, saying that the lack of sun safety could increase the risk of skin cancer. NBC News' Maggie Vespa breaks it all down.

headlines.title: What You Need to Know About Aortic Tears and Bone Health
headlines.description: Dr. Ian Smith, physician and other of “The Last 15: Say Goodbye to Those Most Stubborn Pounds,” joins TODAY to share the warning signs of an aortic tear and breaks down how to improve your bone health.

headlines.title: Grand Canyon rafters report mystery illnesses on social media
headlines.description: The National Park Service is investigating a medical mystery after multiple people returning from river rafting trips in the Grand Canyon reported an unknown illness with flu-like symptoms that won't go away. NBC News' Morgan Chesky explains.

headlines.title: The best portable air conditioners to keep you cool in any space
headlines.description: These top-rated portable ACs from Black+Decker, Shinco and Midea can keep you cool in any space, and are easy to store during colder seasons.

headlines.title: Tired of stubborn pet hair? Make sure you’re using the right vacuum
headlines.description: We spoke with experts about pet hair vacuums and compiled a list of recommendations based on their guidance. Shop our best picks from Bissell, Shark and more.

headlines.title: The best KN95 masks to shop, according to experts
headlines.description: KN95 masks can offer the best protection against Covid, according to the CDC. We asked experts how to wear KN95 masks, plus the best brands to shop from.

headlines.title: The best point-and-shoot cameras of 2026 are compact and easy to use
headlines.description: I tested nearly a dozen point-and-shoot cameras from Kodak, Fujifilm, Sony, Leica, and Ricoh to find the perfect balance of size and quality.

headlines.title: Dozens hospitalized with cyclosporiasis as cases of gastrointestinal illness spike in 31 states
headlines.description: Nearly 3,000 people have been sickened with a gastrointestinal illness called cyclosporiasis, a foodborne infection marked by intense, watery diarrhea, state health officials report.

headlines.title: Bijou Phillips receives kidney transplant after public plea for donor
headlines.description: “The voucher program found me a perfect match!” she wrote on Instagram.

headlines.title: Katie Couric diagnosed with temporary amnesia syndrome
headlines.description: The veteran journalist was diagnosed with transient global amnesia, which can cause sudden memory loss that can be rectified within hours.
